# Srinivasan KB
Product Manager specializing in Developer Platforms and B2B SaaS.
Based in Bangalore, India.

> I build developer platforms that eliminate friction and unlock velocity.

- Role: Software Product Owner at Candescent
- Expertise: Product Strategy, Growth Engineering, Analytics, Technical Product Management, Developer Experience (DX), AI, n8n automations.
